insight: The `Periodic` scan timer is only registered at server startup. If a user changes the `Periodic` setting in settings.yml and runs `/protect reload`, the timer is NOT re-registered — they must do a full server restart for it to take effect. This is a common reason users report "periodic scan not working."

Creative mode players can bypass item scanning by using Saved Hotbars (shift-clicking in creative inventory) or NBT editor mods. The standard `Inventory_Open` and `Item_Spawn` triggers do NOT catch these — dedicated creative inventory event handling (InventoryCreativeEvent) and gamemode change scanning are needed. Also, F3+F4 gamemode switching bypasses command-based scan triggers since it's not a command.
